description_long: This is a vintage-style portable radio receiver with a rectangular, slightly rounded body finished in a pale green color with visible signs of wear and rust, giving it a retro appearance. The front face features a large circular analog tuning dial with frequency markings, three green control knobs, and a speaker grille with horizontal slats. The word 'Retro' is inscribed in a stylized script on the lower left of the front panel. A sturdy metal handle with a green grip arches over the top, attached to the sides with circular mounts. The back and sides are plain, with the back panel showing some discoloration and no visible controls or openings.
description: A retro, pale green portable radio with a large tuning dial, three green knobs, a speaker grille, and a metal handle, showing signs of age and wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tuning dial, three green knobs, speaker grille, 'Retro' inscription, and the handle arching over the top.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the handle attachment and the plain, slightly worn green surface.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, slightly discolored green back panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the handle attachment and plain surface.
